# rbac

Golden conversion cases under this subsystem.

| Case | Direction | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [full](full.md) | `roundtrip` | Full RBAC: default, JSON scopes array, matchMode, policy.csv, two overlays |
| [policy-overlays](policy-overlays.md) | `roundtrip` | RBAC policy.csv, default, scopes, and named policy overlays |
| [scopes-csv](scopes-csv.md) | `roundtrip` | RBAC scopes as bracketed CSV fallback path |
